summary: Normalized stale qd completion report commit SHAs to durable commits reachable from HEAD, tightened qd report validation for non-empty commits[] entries, and made CI checkouts fetch full history so the contract holds on hosted runners.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: reports/qd/m4-dependabot-contract-check/completion.json replaces the unreachable commit SHA with the reachable PR #80 squash merge commit.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: reports/qd/m4-dependabot-contract-check/completion.json now records ce06158edb9393b8c2400ec944a44d61d56e1d59 in commits[], and other stale historical report SHAs exposed by hosted CI were normalized to durable squash merge commits.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects non-empty commits[] entries that are not commits present in the current git repository.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates commit object presence with git cat-file -e "$sha^{commit}" and requires each commit to be reachable from HEAD after preserving the 40-character lowercase hex shape check; evidence/m4-qd-report-commit-reachability-contract/commands.log records unreachable-object and non-ancestor smoke tests failing as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-commit-reachability-contract/commands.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing after durable SHA normalization.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, just check, and a temporary-copy negative smoke test for an unreachable full-length SHA.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-commit-reachability-contract/commands.log records the required Linux validation commands plus fake-SHA and valid-object/non-ancestor negative smoke tests.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false because this is repository qd report metadata validation only.

commandsRun.command: temporary-copy unreachable full-length SHA and non-ancestor SHA negative smoke tests

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd completion-report metadata validation only; Linux validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
